content:
🚀 Now ready to execute Version 7.9. Awaiting final input before moving forward. 🎮📖 Are you fully satisfied with this plan?

📌 Version 8.0 – Finalizing Identity Selection, Betrayal Limits, Secret Alignments, and Real-World Randomness Mechanics


🚀 This iteration finalizes identity selection, faction & party flexibility, betrayal mechanics, and real-world elements affecting randomness.

📜 1. Player Identity Selection Process (Finalized Version)

📜 Each player now selects multiple identity layers to define their role in the game world.

✔ 1️⃣ Icon or Symbol (Their Initial Identity Representation)
• Players select a literary icon, symbol, or motif that defines their starting perspective.
• Example: The Labyrinth, The Mirror, The Scales, The Mask.
• This choice may influence secret alignment progression.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 468 (chunk 468/555)
